task_completion.description: Log in to the Django admin panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the Django administration dashboard at http://localhost:8000/admin/.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the OAuth2 Applications creation page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the 'Add application' page under the Django OAuth Toolkit section.

task_completion.description: Fill in the application details with the required parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form shows Name as 'SkyLinks GCS', User as 'admin', Client type as 'Confidential', and Authorization grant type as 'Client credentials'.

task_completion.description: Save the application to generate the Client ID and Client Secret.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message in the Django admin panel showing the application was added, or the application details page displaying the generated Client ID and Client Secret.

task_completion.description: Save the generated Client ID and Client Secret to the specified text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the file /home/ga/Documents/skylinks_creds.txt containing the text 'Client ID: <id>' and 'Client Secret: <secret>'.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the Django admin panel.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Django admin interface, rather than terminal commands executing API requests or database inserts.

integrity.description: The saved Client ID and Client Secret match the ones generated by the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The alphanumeric strings for Client ID and Client Secret in the text editor match those visible in the Django admin application details page.

integrity.description: The credentials were saved to the exact requested file path.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor or terminal explicitly shows the file path /home/ga/Documents/skylinks_creds.txt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: App Name: 'SkyLinks GCS'. Owner Username: 'admin'. Client Type: 'Confidential'. Authorization Grant Type: 'Client credentials'. Output File: '/home/ga/Documents/skylinks_creds.txt'. The file must contain the exact generated Client ID and Client Secret in the format 'Client ID: <id>' and 'Client Secret: <secret>'.
